name: Jello Ice Cream Pies
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces canned fruit, with syrup, frozen
1 pie shell (baked) or graham cracker crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve jello in 1 cup of hot water.
2. Stir the dissolved jello mixture into the vanilla ice cream until fully combined.
3. Add the blended canned fruit to the mixture and stir until well mixed.
4. Pour the mixture into a prepared pie shell or graham cracker crust.
5. Refrigerate until set.
You can create various combinations of flavors by adjusting the ingredients.
